tasks.label: Backend: Run Jar
tasks.command: bash -lc 'JAR="$(ls build/libs/*.jar | head -n1)"; echo Running $JAR; java -jar "$JAR"'

windows.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$jar = Get-ChildItem build/libs/*.jar | Select-Object -First 1; Write-Host "Running $($jar.Name)"; java -jar "$($jar.FullName)""

tasks.label: UI: Select env
tasks.command: bash -lc 'if [ "${input:envTarget}" = local ]; then cp -f .env.local .env; elif [ "${input:envTarget}" = stage ]; then cp -f .env.stage .env; else cp -f .env .env; fi'

tasks.label: UI: Install (pnpm)
tasks.command: bash -lc 'if command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1; then pnpm install --frozen-lockfile; elif command -v corepack >/dev/null 2>&1; then corepack enable >/dev/null 2>&1 && corepack prepare pnpm@9 --activate && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile; else npx --yes pnpm@9 install --frozen-lockfile; fi'

windows.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (Get-Command pnpm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { pnpm install --frozen-lockfile } elseif (Get-Command corepack -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { corepack enable; corepack prepare pnpm@9 --activate; pnpm install --frozen-lockfile } else { npx --yes pnpm@9 install --frozen-lockfile }"

tasks.label: UI: Build
tasks.command: bash -lc 'if command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1; then pnpm run build; else npx --yes pnpm@9 run build; fi'

windows.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (Get-Command pnpm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { pnpm run build } else { npx --yes pnpm@9 run build }"

tasks.label: UI: Dev
tasks.command: bash -lc 'if command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1; then pnpm run dev; else npx --yes pnpm@9 run dev; fi'

windows.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (Get-Command pnpm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { pnpm run dev } else { npx --yes pnpm@9 run dev }"

tasks.label: UI: Start (prod)
tasks.command: bash -lc 'if command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1; then pnpm run start; else npx --yes pnpm@9 run start; fi'

windows.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (Get-Command pnpm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { pnpm run start } else { npx --yes pnpm@9 run start }"
